mapper.sql: id, user_id, product_id, product_name, price, status, expire_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seckill_order (id, user_id, product_id, product_name, price, status, expire_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{price}, #{status}, #{expireTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM seckill_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seckill_order WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT FROM seckill_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND status IN (0, 3) LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_order SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
